SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO

Packages that use WaitlistEntryDTO
Package
Description
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of WaitlistEntryDTO in client.view

    Methods in client.view with parameters of type WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private HBox
    WaitlistController.dataRow(WaitlistEntryDTO e, boolean withDivider)
    Builds one waiting-list row: an offer row (countdown + Accept/Decline) or a plain WAITING row (status + Leave).
    private boolean
    WaitlistController.isOffered(WaitlistEntryDTO e)
    True when the entry currently holds a parseable grab offer (offered + has an expiry).
    Method parameters in client.view with type arguments of type WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    WaitlistController.populate(List<WaitlistEntryDTO> rows)
    Renders the header and one row per waiting entry (offer rows stand out).
    private void
    WaitlistController.resubscribe(List<WaitlistEntryDTO> rows)
    Points this screen's per-reservation subscriptions at exactly the WAITING reservation ids on screen, dropping the previous set first (also sends the matching UNSUBSCRIBE).

  • Uses of WaitlistEntryDTO in server.control

    Methods in server.control that return WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private WaitlistEntryDTO
    ReservationController.resolveEntry(ClientRequest request)
    Resolves the waiting-list entry a request targets.
    Methods in server.control with parameters of type WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private boolean
    ReservationController.isOfferActive(WaitlistEntryDTO entry)
    Whether an entry's grab offer is still live: it has been offered and its expiry is in the future.

  • Uses of WaitlistEntryDTO in server.dao

    Methods in server.dao that return WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    WaitlistDAO.findNextEligible(int parkId, String visitDate, int freedCapacity)
    Finds the FIFO-first queue entry eligible to be offered a freed slot: the earliest-queued entry whose reservation is still WAITING for the given park and date, that does not already hold an offer, and whose party fits the freed capacity ("must-fit").
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    WaitlistDAO.getById(int id)
    Looks up a single queue entry by its primary key.
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    WaitlistDAO.getByReservation(int reservationId)
    Looks up the queue entry for a given reservation.
    private WaitlistEntryDTO
    WaitlistDAO.map(ResultSet rs)
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via WaitlistDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a WaitlistEntryDTO.
    Methods in server.dao that return types with arguments of type WaitlistEntryDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    WaitlistDAO.findActiveByVisitor(long visitorId)
    Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries — those whose reservation is still WAITING — in FIFO (queue) order.
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    WaitlistDAO.findExpiredOffers()
    Lists every entry whose active offer has lapsed — those with an offer set (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) whose grab_expires_at is now in the past, ordered FIFO.
    List<WaitlistEntryDTO>
    WaitlistDAO.findExpiredOffers(boolean force)
    Force-aware variant of WaitlistDAO.findExpiredOffers().
